To align with PaddlePaddle's requirement while preserving semantic equivalence, 'y' must be converted to a 0-dimensional tensor of matching dtype (float32). This repair ensures both frameworks compute the same element-wise >= operation on a (0,2)-shaped tensor against scalar 0.0.
